description: Baseline: browser CDN bundle.min.js gzipped size
terser compress passes: 3 — better dead code elimination and folding
terser compress ecma: 2017 — enables modern JS optimizations (arrow fns, etc)
Remove unused breadcrumbData variable in fetch breadcrumb handler
terser: enable toplevel, unsafe_comps, unsafe_math, pure_getters
hoist_funs + hoist_vars — worse gzipped despite better raw (hurts gzip patterns)
terser: unsafe_arrows — converts functions to arrows, saves ~1.3KB raw
terser: unsafe_methods — converts { m: function(){} } to { m(){} }
unsafe_proto + unsafe_regexp — no gzip improvement
terser compress module: true — no improvement
terser: mangle.toplevel — mangle top-level variable names in IIFE
Simplify _enhanceEventWithInitialFrame — remove redundant variable aliases
LazyLoadableIntegrations derivation — test fails, bundle names with hyphens don't match CDN filenames
Derive LazyLoadableIntegrations bundle names instead of storing duplicated strings
getReportDialogEndpoint: use URLSearchParams — no size improvement
terser collapse_vars — already default, no change
terser compress ecma: 2020 — enables nullish coalescing, optional chaining in output
output.ecma: 2020 — no additional improvement over compress.ecma
unsafe_undefined — no change (void 0 same length as undefined)
terser: increase compress passes from 3 to 5 — slightly more dead code found
Simplify isNativeFunction regex — shorter and more permissive [native code] check
Replace extension protocol array+some with regex test in _isEmbeddedBrowserExtension
Inline allowedAttrs array — terser already handles this
DEFAULT_EVENT_TARGET: use comma-separated string.split instead of array literal (51B raw savings)
LAZY_LOADABLE_NAMES: use comma-separated string.split (31B raw savings)
Verify current state after resume — matches previous best
Rename sentryWrapped → sW in wrap() function, update frame stripping regex to match both names
Simplify getOwnProperties: Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(obj)) instead of manual loop
Consolidate sendSession aggregate/session logic — slightly worse gzip
Extract browserapierrors mechanism prefix to MECH const — no gzip improvement (gzip already handles repetition)
Simplify getErrorPropertyFromObject: Object.values().find() instead of for-in loop with hasOwnProperty
Shorten DEFAULT_IGNORE_ERRORS patterns — no gzip improvement despite shorter raw strings
Remove redundant terser options (unsafe_undefined, collapse_vars already defaults) — cleaner config
Shorthand property value in addNonEnumerableProperty — terser already does this
ITEM_TYPE_TO_DATA_CATEGORY_MAP: remove self-mapping entries with fallback — gzip already handles the repetition
Replace SENTRY_BAGGAGE_KEY_PREFIX_REGEX.match with startsWith — no size change
Remove stale output.ecma: 2020 from terser config (no effect on output)
unsafe_Function terser option — 1 byte worse
Resume session 3 — verify current state, matches previous best within noise
Simplify supportsNativeFetch: remove redundant iframe-based native check, just use _isFetchSupported. Saves ~200B gzipped.
Clean up leaked core changes from discarded experiments — revert api.ts, client.ts, eventFilters.ts, baggage.ts, browser.ts, envelope.ts, object.ts addNonEnumerableProperty
Update autoresearch.sh to auto-rebuild core/browser-utils when their sources change
baggage.ts: startsWith instead of match — no gzip change (now with proper core rebuild)
Slim ITEM_TYPE_TO_DATA_CATEGORY_MAP: remove self-mapping entries, fallback to type as category. Saves 38B gzipped.
Shorten DEFAULT_IGNORE_ERRORS: simplify vv().getRestrictions and simulateEvent regex patterns. Saves 32B gzipped.
